topic: Two colleagues are both considered for the same promotion
raw_output:
[story 1]

The moment Sarah saw the email, a bright warmth flooded her chest, spreading outward like spilled sunshine. Her fingers, usually stiff on the keyboard, danced across the screen, a rapid series of taps that betrayed her barely contained excitement. She leaned back in her chair, a small, involuntary laugh bubbling up and escaping before she could stop it. "This is it," she murmured to the empty office, her voice pitched higher than usual. She immediately began mentally rehearsing her acceptance speech, picturing the applause, the new title gleaming on her lapel. A genuine, wide smile stretched across her face, crinkling the corners of her eyes as she reviewed her accomplishments one last time. The air in the cubicle seemed to vibrate with her anticipation.

[story 2]

Mark felt a sudden, dizzying lift in his spirit. He paced the length of his desk, his energy practically buzzing under his skin. He stopped abruptly, planting his hands on the edge of the filing cabinet, his breath catching in a sharp, quick intake. He looked around the office, his eyes sparkling with an almost manic glee. "No way," he whispered, the sound laced with disbelief and pure elation. He started humming a tuneless, upbeat melody, a physical manifestation of his surging joy. He spun around, catching the eye of a nearby coworker, and offered a grin so broad it felt like it might split his face in two. He felt an overwhelming urge to shout his good news from the rooftops, a wild, unrestrained feeling propelling him forward.

[story 3]

When Clara read the notification, a genuine, unrestrained smile broke across her features, transforming her entire expression. She let out a soft, delighted gasp, clutching her mug so tightly her knuckles turned white. A wave of pure, buoyant energy washed over her, making her feel light as air. She immediately stood up, stretching her arms high above her head, a full-body wiggle of sheer happiness. "Oh, this is wonderful!" she exclaimed, her voice ringing with an almost breathless enthusiasm. She started tapping her foot rapidly against the floor, a rhythmic drumming that mirrored the quickening beat of her heart. She couldn't wait to share this incredible news with everyone she knew.
